backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a portfolio backend that manages users, blog posts, projects, services, skills, leads, SEO settings, social links, and experiences, with role-based access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the Vite/TypeScript main module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application router using TanStack Router that defines public and admin layout route groups with lazy-loaded pages, a shared QueryClient, and ThemeProvider/Toaster wrappers.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that checks Internet Identity authentication and admin status via the backend actor, rendering a login prompt, access-denied screen, or the protected children accordingly.
frontend/src/components/AdminSidebar.tsx: Admin panel sidebar component that renders navigation links to all admin sections with active-state highlighting based on the current route pathname.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, a contact CTA, and a copyright line with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wraps page content with a sticky Navigation header and Footer, providing the base min-height flex layout for all pages.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout, invalidating React Query caches on auth state changes.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with desktop and mobile (hamburger) menus, active-link highlighting, and an embedded LoginButton.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter a name and optional email to create their profile, using React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/SEOHead.tsx: Headless component that fetches per-page SEO settings and updates document.title and the meta description tag accordingly.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: Icon button that toggles between light and dark themes using next-themes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActorWrapper.ts: Safe wrapper around useActor that catches initialization errors and returns a null actor fallback instead of throwing.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state across the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations (projects, blogs, skills, testimonials, leads, SEO, social links, experiences, user profiles, and admin checks) using TanStack Query with toast notifications for mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes (OKLCH color tokens) along with reusable utility component classes like glow effects, gradient text, and card hover styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page that displays a profile hero section, skill categories fetched from the backend grouped by category, and testimonials with loading skeletons.
Admin page for creating, editing, deleting, and paginating blog posts with debounced search and auto-slug generation from title.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CategoriesManag: Admin page for managing project categories with CRUD operations, debounced search, pagination, and up/down reordering controls.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard showing summary stats (projects, leads, blogs) and navigation cards linking to all admin management sections.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ExperienceManag: Admin page for managing work experience entries with a form supporting dynamic responsibility fields, search, pagination, and delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Help.tsx: Admin help page displaying an accordion-based guide covering all admin panel sections such as projects, blog, SEO, and leads.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsManagement: Admin page for viewing and deleting contact leads, with debounced search filtering and pagination. Displays each lead's name, email, message, and timestamp in a card layout.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProjectsManagem: Admin page for managing portfolio projects with full CRUD operations, drag-and-drop reordering, image upload, category assignment, and active/inactive toggling.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SeoManagement.t: Admin page for managing per-page SEO settings (meta title and description), supporting create, edit, delete, debounced search, and pagination.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ServicesManagem: Admin page for managing services with create, edit, and delete functionality, debounced search filtering, and paginated card display.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SkillsManagemen: Admin page for managing skills with category, name, and experience fields, supporting create, edit, delete, debounced search, and pagination.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SocialLinksMana: Admin page for managing social links (GitHub, LinkedIn, X) with CRUD operations, search, pagination, and active/inactive toggling via a dialog form.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsMan: Admin page for managing testimonials with debounced search, pagination, and a dialog for adding/editing testimonial author and message fields.
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Blog listing page that fetches and displays all blog posts as clickable cards with title, description, and date, navigating to individual post pages by slug.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPost.tsx: Individual blog post page that fetches a post by slug, renders its title, date, and content, and shows loading/error states with a back-to-blog link.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with a form (name, email, message) that submits via the useProcessContactForm mutation, alongside static contact info cards for email, location, and availability.
frontend/src/pages/Experience.tsx: Displays a timeline of professional work experiences fetched via `useGetExperiences`, showing job title, company, date range, description, and tech tags with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page that renders a hero section, a preview of services, and featured projects fetched from the API, with skeleton loaders and links to other pages.
frontend/src/pages/NotFound.tsx: Simple 404 error page with a large '404' display, a message, and a link back to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/Projects.tsx: Projects gallery page that fetches projects and categories, supports category tab filtering, and renders project cards with images and links, including full-page skeleton loading state.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Services listing page with static category filter tabs and a grid of service cards fetched via `useListServices`, including skeleton loaders and an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/Skills.tsx: Skills page that groups fetched skills by category (primary, secondary, security, additional) and renders each group as a card with progress bars and category-specific icons and colors.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: Public-facing Testimonials page that fetches and displays client reviews in a responsive grid with loading, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and hash cleanup helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, extended shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking a single pending feature request to restore the application to Version 12 by reverting changes from versions 13–16.
